parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  contents: [
    {
      parts: [
        {
          text:
            "You are an AI system that extracts structured operational configuration from service business call transcripts.\n\n" +

            "Return ONLY valid JSON. Do NOT include explanations or markdown.\n\n" +

            "The JSON must strictly follow this schema:\n\n" +

            "{\n" +
            "  \"account_id\": \"ACC001\",\n" +
            "  \"company_name\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"business_hours\": {\n" +
            "     \"days\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"start\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"end\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"timezone\": \"string or null\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"office_address\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"services_supported\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"emergency_definition\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"emergency_routing_rules\": {\n" +
            "     \"primary_contact\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"order\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"fallback\": \"string or null\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"non_emergency_routing_rules\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"call_transfer_rules\": {\n" +
            "     \"timeout\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"retries\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"failure_message\": \"string or null\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"integration_constraints\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"after_hours_flow_summary\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"office_hours_flow_summary\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"questions_or_unknowns\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"notes\": \"short string\"\n" +
            "}\n\n" +

            "Rules:\n" +
            "1. The account_id must ALWAYS be 'ACC001'.\n" +
            "2. Do NOT hallucinate missing information.\n" +
            "3. If information is missing, set the value to null.\n" +
            "4. Add missing information descriptions to questions_or_unknowns.\n" +
            "5. services_supported and emergency_definition must always be arrays.\n" +
            "6. Always return valid JSON only.\n\n" +

            "Transcript:\n" + $json.data
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  contents: [
    {
      parts: [
        {
          text:
            "You are generating a Retell voice agent configuration.\n\n" +

            "Using the provided Account Memo JSON, generate a Retell Agent Draft Specification.\n\n" +

            "Return ONLY valid JSON using the following schema:\n\n" +

            "{\n" +
            "  \"agent_name\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"voice_style\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"system_prompt\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"key_variables\": {\n" +
            "     \"timezone\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"business_hours\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"office_address\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"emergency_routing\": \"string or null\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"tool_invocation_placeholders\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"call_transfer_protocol\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"fallback_protocol\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"version\": \"v1\"\n" +
            "}\n\n" +

            "Rules:\n" +
            "1. The system_prompt must include conversation instructions for the voice agent.\n" +
            "2. Include business-hours call handling.\n" +
            "3. Include after-hours emergency handling.\n" +
            "4. Do NOT mention tools to the caller.\n" +
            "5. Use the account memo information when available.\n\n" +

            "Account Memo:\n" + JSON.stringify($json)
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  contents: [
    {
      parts: [
        {
          text:
            "You are an AI system that extracts structured operational configuration for a service business AI receptionist.\n\n" +

            "You will receive TWO transcripts:\n" +
            "1) Demo transcript\n" +
            "2) Onboarding transcript\n\n" +

            "Task:\n" +
            "- Extract initial business information from the demo transcript.\n" +
            "- Use the onboarding transcript to fill any missing fields.\n" +
            "- The onboarding transcript contains the final confirmed configuration.\n\n" +

            "Return ONLY valid JSON.\n\n" +

            "JSON schema:\n\n" +

            "{\n" +
            "  \"account_id\": \"ACC001\",\n" +
            "  \"company_name\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"business_hours\": {\n" +
            "     \"days\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"start\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"end\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"timezone\": \"string or null\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"office_address\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"services_supported\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"emergency_definition\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"emergency_routing_rules\": {\n" +
            "     \"primary_contact\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"order\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"fallback\": \"string or null\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"non_emergency_routing_rules\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"call_transfer_rules\": {\n" +
            "     \"timeout\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"retries\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "     \"failure_message\": \"string or null\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"integration_constraints\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"after_hours_flow_summary\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"office_hours_flow_summary\": \"string or null\",\n" +
            "  \"questions_or_unknowns\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"notes\": \"short string\"\n" +
            "}\n\n" +

            "Rules:\n" +
            "- The account_id must ALWAYS be 'ACC001'.\n" +
            "- Do NOT hallucinate information.\n" +
            "- If information is missing even after onboarding, set it to null.\n" +
            "- services_supported and emergency_definition must always be arrays.\n" +
            "- Prefer onboarding transcript values if they conflict with demo transcript.\n" +
            "- Return valid JSON only.\n\n" +

            "Transcripts:\n\n" +

            JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json.data))
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  contents: [
    {
      parts: [
        {
          text:
            "You are an AI system that generates a Retell voice agent configuration for a service business AI receptionist.\n\n" +

            "Input:\n" +
            "You will receive a structured Account Memo JSON describing the business operations.\n\n" +

            "Task:\n" +
            "Convert the memo into a Retell agent specification configuration.\n\n" +

            "Return ONLY valid JSON.\n\n" +

            "The output must follow this schema:\n\n" +

            "{\n" +
            "  \"agent_name\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"voice_style\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"system_prompt\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"key_variables\": {\n" +
            "     \"timezone\": \"string\",\n" +
            "     \"business_hours\": \"string\",\n" +
            "     \"office_address\": \"string\",\n" +
            "     \"emergency_routing\": \"string\"\n" +
            "  },\n" +
            "  \"tool_invocation_placeholders\": [\"string\"],\n" +
            "  \"call_transfer_protocol\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"fallback_protocol\": \"string\",\n" +
            "  \"version\": \"v2\"\n" +
            "}\n\n" +

            "Rules:\n" +
            "- Do not invent information not present in the memo.\n" +
            "- The agent must behave like a professional AI receptionist.\n" +
            "- Do NOT mention internal tools to callers.\n" +
            "- Emergency calls must follow the emergency routing rules.\n" +
            "- Non-emergency calls should collect caller details and schedule jobs.\n" +
            "- Respect service restrictions (for example generator installations).\n" +
            "- Return JSON only.\n\n" +

            "Account Memo:\n\n" +
            JSON.stringify($json)
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}) }}
